tools.name: get_account_summary
tools.title: Get account summary
tools.description: Summarize this signed-in user's Dial Smart leads, campaigns, recent calls, and phone-number inventory.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.title: List campaigns
tools.description: List this signed-in user's Dial Smart campaigns with basic pacing and provider configuration.

status.description: Optional campaign status filter such as active, paused, completed, or draft.

limit.description: Maximum campaigns to return. The tool clamps this to a safe limit.

tools.name: search_leads
tools.title: Search leads
tools.description: Search this signed-in user's leads by status, name, company, email, or phone number.

query.description: Optional text or phone search term.

dueCallbacksOnly.description: When true, return only leads with callbacks due now or earlier.

limit.description: Maximum leads to return. The tool clamps this to a safe limit.

tools.name: list_recent_calls
tools.title: List recent calls
tools.description: List this signed-in user's recent call records with outcomes, providers, durations, and summaries.

limit.description: Maximum calls to return. The tool clamps this to a safe limit.

tools.name: list_phone_number_health
tools.title: List phone-number health
tools.description: List this signed-in user's phone numbers with lightweight health flags for campaign readiness.

provider.description: Optional provider filter such as retell, telnyx, or twilio.

limit.description: Maximum phone numbers to return. The tool clamps this to a safe limit.
